LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL; APPEARANCES: ALEXANDER F. EAGLE, III, ESQ. EAGLE & CRAWFORD, (408) 395-9898, APPEARED AS COUNSEL FOR FRANK, ANNE, AND JONATHAN CORBETT AND CONTRACTORS' LICENSE COURSES OF CALIFORNIA, INC., MOVING TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCES, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS THE ORDER OF THE COURT: THE MOTION OF ALEXANDER F. EAGLE, III, ESQ. TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR FRANK, ANNE, AND JONATHAN CORBETT AND CONTRACTORS' LICENSE COURSES OF CALIFORNIA, INC. IS GRANTED. ORDER EFFECTIVE UPON SERVICE OF CLIENT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR # 3620
